headline: Julia Language
description: Julia (Jeff Bezanson, Stefan Karpinski, Viral Shah, Alan Edelman, 2012, MIT) solves the 'two-language problem' — high-level syntax with C-like speed. Just-in-time (JIT) compilation via LLVM. Used for scientific computing, ML, finance, and HPC. Key packages: DifferentialEquations.jl, Flux.jl (ML).
